alpha_thesis.title: BB Position Dominated Mean-Reversion/Location Edge — SCALP 1h
alpha_thesis.description: bb_position = normalized location of close within Bollinger Bands. Near upper band (bb_position≈1) → mean-reversion sell signal (SHORT). Near lower band (bb_position≈0) → mean-reversion buy signal (LONG). The 16-feature XGBoost model effectively learns a threshold/regime-dependent version of this strategy where bb_position carries 97.3% of predictive power (shuffle ablation on real Binance data).

primary_driver.bands_formula: upper[t] = SMA(close, window=20) + 2.0 × rolling_std(close, window=20); lower[t] = SMA(close, window=20) - 2.0 × rolling_std(close, window=20)
primary_driver.causality: uses close[t-window+1 .. t] only — causal, no lookahead
primary_driver.leakage_audit: CLEAN — no look-ahead, no label overlap, verified via static code audit

model_config.feature_pruning_method: DoubleEnsemble shuffle ablation (<2% impact removed, retrain validated) on REAL Binance data
model_config.label_generation: triple-barrier with mode-specific stop/target, cost deducted (8bps round trip)

data.reality_check: PREVIOUS SYNTHETIC RESULTS INVALIDATED — real data results differ substantially

1a_gross_net.detail: Cost authority 8bps round trip. Fold-averaged net_R=0.0081 (correct-only), cost ratio ~10% of gross.

1b_block_bootstrap.detail: Aggregate CI=[0.0076, 0.0086], 6/6 folds fully positive. Edge robust on real data.

1c_threshold_audit.detail: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.55 selected via val composite optimization on real data. No data leakage.

phase2_results.data_restoration: Scripts/restore_real_data.py — worktree data_lake -> data/raw/. load_cached_data() confirmed.
phase2_results.isolation_test: ADIM 3 (correct-only 0.0081) vs ADIM 4 (all-trades 0.0043) farki TAMAMEN metrik tanimindan. Correct-only tum 4 config'de 0.0081.

baseline_comparison.note: Synthetic results (32-feat @ 0.715, composite=223.0) were on 3K bars synthetic data. Real results use 118K bars real Binance data.

val_folds_1_5_real_data.note: bb_position-only composite: synthetic 146.55, real 175.56. Edge stronger on real data.

test_fold_6_real_data.note: Isolation test shows bb_position-only captures ~38% of full model composite on real data.

G0_doc_ready.evidence_ref: AlphaForge docs complete. Handoff JSON updated to v1.1.0 with real data results.

G1_research_backtest.evidence_ref: Phase reality complete on REAL Binance data (4 symbols, 118K bars, 1h). 16-feat XGBoost, threshold=0.55, 6-fold WFV. Test total_net_R=19.66 > 0, CI=[0.0037, 0.0050] fully positive. bb_position-dominated mean-reversion edge confirmed on real data.

G2_walk_forward_oos.evidence_ref: 6-fold anchored expanding walk-forward on REAL data with purge/embargo. 5 val folds + 1 test fold separation. Block-bootstrap 95% CI fully positive. Feature pruning 54->16 on real data.

G3_cost_stress.evidence_ref: Cost authority: simulation/authority.py (total round_trip=10bps). Label generator deducts 8bps. Phase 1a audit: 6/6 folds positive, cost ratio ~10%.

G4_regime_breakdown.evidence_ref: Not yet evaluated with real market regime data.

G5_symbol_stability.evidence_ref: 4-symbol real data (BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, BNBUSDT). Per-symbol contribution not yet analyzed.

G6_calibration_reliability.evidence_ref: Confidence threshold=0.55 selected via val composite optimization on real data. XGBoost softmax probabilities used directly. CalibrationCandidate not yet produced.

blocked_scopes: SCALP mode only — no SWING or AGGRESSIVE_SCALP validation
4-symbol universe only — cross-sectional multi-symbol not fully tested
Funding model DEFERRED — perpetual/live scope blocked
G7-G10 infrastructure not built — no shadow/paper/live path
limitations: without_bb_position model likely collapses (not retested on real data)
Position sizing as standalone lever confirmed ineffective (synthetic; not retested on real)
No transaction cost modeling beyond taker fee (funding, spread widening not modeled)
Test composite (129) lower than synthetic (223) — real data is harder, as expected

lineage.note: Real data restored from worktree data_lake (wf_af3f20e1-0b2-11). Scripts/restore_real_data.py.
